title: Ethium Knight Armor
description: Makes Create: Ethium Armor have the same textures as Spryzeen's Knight Armor
body: This is a very straightforward resourcepack that adds compatability between [Spryzeen's Knight Armor](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spryzeens-knight-armor) and [Ethium Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/mod/ethium). It's very simple, but for those who likes consistency and the general style of Knight Armor, this pack is for you!
